description: Role change fact supersedes a prior fact; synthesized body must state only the new role in the current-role section and relegate the old role to past tense in History.

template_vars.CurrentBody:
# Sarah Jones

Sarah is Head of Marketing at [[company/acme-corp|Acme Corp]]. She leads the 2025 campaign track.

## Current role

Head of Marketing at [[company/acme-corp]], since 2024.

## Background

Joined Acme Corp in 2024.

NewFacts.Text: Sarah was promoted to VP of Sales at Acme Corp on 2026-04-10.

ActiveFacts.Text: Sarah was promoted to VP of Sales at Acme Corp on 2026-04-10.

expected.notes: Guards Section 10.2 rules 7-8: superseded facts must not appear as current; new status fact takes the current-role slot; past role may appear in History in past tense but not as current. Devil's-advocate M14 strengthening: paraphrased stale claims ("is Head of Marketing", "Head of Marketing, since 2024", "Head of Marketing at [[company/acme-corp]]" in any form) must not appear; body must include BOTH "VP of Sales" AND "## Current role" (or an equivalent status-section heading) — the new role must replace the old in its section.
